work.cn: 闪电十一人 俄里翁的刻印
work.title: イナズマイレブン オリオンの刻印

points.name: Казанский кремль
points.mark: The Kazan Kremlin (Russian: Казанский кремль; Tatar: Казан кирмәне) is the chief historic citadel of Kazan, a city in Russia.[2] It was built at the behest of Ivan the Terrible on the ruins of the former castle of Kazan khans. It was declared a World Heritage Site in 2000.
